name: SKILL.md Autonomy Rules Section (lines 94-128)
applicability: 22 auto-run commands + 7 ask-first commands with per-command reasons. Direct retrofit candidate for add-debt, pr-review, session-end, audit-* skills. ~30 min per skill to add this section.
home_connection: Skill format evolution. Add Autonomy Rules to sonash SKILL.md template.

name: cli/skill.py — Skill Install + Version Stamping
applicability: SkillTarget dataclass → write SKILL.md to ~/.claude/skills/ and ~/.agents/skills/. Version stamping via HTML comment regex. `skill install` + `skill status` commands. Directly retires cross_locale_config drift problem. Needs Node port.
home_connection: Skill distribution for JASON-OS. Solves cross-locale drift.

name: rpc-health.yml — Nightly RPC Health Check
applicability: Daily cron health check against live external API. 3 exit codes, auto-creates labeled GitHub issues on failure. Pattern transferable to monitoring Claude tool API, MCP server health, Anthropic SDK drift, GitHub Actions API changes.
home_connection: External contract monitoring. Your hooks rely on GitHub APIs that could change.

name: CLAUDE.md — Agent Guidance Pattern
applicability: Well-structured CLAUDE.md: project overview, dev commands, pre-commit checks, architecture overview, PR workflow. Compare against your CLAUDE.md (5.9) for structural ideas. Their ambient PR workflow is an alternative to your invoked /pr-review.
home_connection: CLAUDE.md format comparison and PR workflow design.

name: AGENTS.md — Multi-Agent Guidance
applicability: Separate file for Codex/parallel agent guidance. Module organization, testing split, commit style. You embed agent guidance in CLAUDE.md Section 7. Separate file reduces CLAUDE.md bloat.
home_connection: Consider AGENTS.md separation if CLAUDE.md grows further.

name: npx skills add (unverified open skills ecosystem)
applicability: SKILL.md references 'npx skills add teng-lin/notebooklm-py'. If real, this is a skill distribution CLI relevant to JASON-OS. Needs 15-min web research to verify.
home_connection: JASON-OS skill distribution model. Critical to verify.

name: 8 CI workflows (most mature in all 6 repos)
applicability: CodeQL, nightly, publish, testpypi-publish, rpc-health, test, verify-artifacts, verify-package. The CI maturity here is what cli-anything lacks. Reference for what 'complete CI' looks like.
home_connection: CI reference. Your hook pipeline is different (pre-commit + pre-push) but the coverage goal is similar.

name: SKILL.md Embedded Task() Subagent Patterns
applicability: Workflow steps include literal Task(prompt=..., subagent_type=...) invocations. Reduces agent cognitive load from 'design task prompt' to 'fill parameters'. Retrofit for long-running skill workflows.
home_connection: Skill workflow patterns. Could embed in deep-research, audit skills.
